arts.ttl: Man Utd Used as Leverage in Wage Negotiations by €70M-Rated PSG Standout’s Camp
arts.sum: The January transfer window marks Ruben Amorim’s first opportunity to shape Manchester United in his image. While more significant changes are expected in the summer, reports suggest Amorim has already set his sights on a key target from Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Chelsea Set to Initiate Talks with Man Utd Over £70M-Rated Tottenham, PSG-Linked Talent
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to exclude Alejandro Garnacho from the Manchester derby last month has sparked renewed speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United.
